title: T-035 — SCN-031 Move LP UI (06-c)
prompt:
# T-035 — SCN-031 Move LP

PRD: 06-SCANNER-P1-PRD.md §8.3 FR-SC-FE-030/031
UX: design/06-SCANNER-P1-UX.md:454-480 §3.10
Prototype: design/Monopilot Design System/scanner/flow-other.jsx:10-86 (label move_screen)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Deliver SCN-031 — scan LP → mini-grid details → scan destination (or 4 quick-buttons for frequent locations) → confirm → done success orange→green; with status-block error handling (hold/consumed/blocked).

## Implementation contract
1. /scanner/move + /scanner/move/done.
2. Scan LP triggers /lock-lp; on success render mini-grid + destination scan + 4 quick-buttons.
3. Submit calls /move-lp + /release-lock; on validation block render full-screen error per D9 block severity (e.g. 'LP na QA Hold, nie można przesunąć').

## Files
- apps/scanner/src/app/scanner/move/page.tsx [create]
- apps/scanner/src/app/scanner/move/done/page.tsx [create]
- apps/scanner/__tests__/scn-031-move.test.tsx [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the page renders, when compared to `design/Monopilot Design System/scanner/flow-other.jsx:10-86`, then it has the LP scan area, a mini-grid of LP details, the destination scan area, and 4 quick-buttons in the same order — RTL snapshot + manual checklist (structural + visual + interaction parity)
2. Given an LP whose lookup returns status='hold', when the LP scan completes, then a full-screen block error 'LP na QA Hold, nie można przesunąć' is shown and the destination scan is hidden
3. Given a successful move, when /move-lp returns 200, then /release-lock is called and the user is redirected to /scanner/move/done with the orange→green animation

## Test strategy
- RED: write scn-031-move.test.tsx asserting parity + hold-block + happy-path with lock release before implementation
- Run 'pnpm --filter scanner test scn-031-move'

## Risk red lines
- Do not skip /release-lock on success
- Do not let user proceed past hold/consumed/blocked status
- Do not allow destination = current location

pipeline_inputs.description: SCN-031 Move LP screen with lock acquisition, mini-grid, 4 quick-buttons, hold/consumed/blocked block errors.
pipeline_inputs.details:
Parity checklist:
1) LP scan area at top.
2) LP mini-grid below the scan area.
3) Destination scan area + 4 quick-buttons (frequent locations).
4) Status block errors per D9 — full screen.
5) /lock-lp acquired before destination, /release-lock called after success.
out_of_scope: Do not implement supervisor force-release here
Do not implement SCN-040 putaway here
